content:
Sonnet 5 looks absurdly priced

• Opus 4.8 Max - $1.80

• Sonnet 5 Max - $2.29

• Fable 5 - $2.75

Sonnet 5 is about 27% more expensive than Opus 4.8.

Why does the smaller model cost more than the flagship?

Because compute is more expensive now and the old pricing was still 'early adopter discount'. They were making a loss/tiny margin to date on models, but if they suddenly jump price on existing models, people will switch to a different provider... So the logical alternative is deprecate it over time, for a more expensive 'new' model.
